generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms, but about protecting them. Look at how quickly authorities responded to the last major incident - that only happens with the right tools. Critics say 'but civil liberties!', but when has a single law ever been the difference between freedom and chaos? The real question is: do we want to be prepared, or wait for the next crisis to tell us what we should've done? #SecurityFirst #DutyBeforeDebate
